description_long: This is a long, rectangular bench with a flat wooden seat and a minimalist, industrial design. The seat is constructed from a single, continuous plank of wood, finished in a warm, medium-brown tone with visible wood grain. Supporting the seat are two robust, black metal legs at each end, connected by a diagonal cross-brace for added stability and visual interest. The bench has no backrest or armrests, emphasizing its streamlined and functional form. Its sturdy construction and weather-resistant materials make it suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or public plazas. The overall aesthetic is modern and utilitarian, blending natural and industrial elements.
description: A long, modern bench with a wooden seat and black metal legs, featuring a cross-brace for stability and no backrest or armrests.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow profile of the wooden seat and the rectangular metal leg.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden seat, the black metal legs, and the diagonal cross-brace.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, showing the other end of the bench and the leg structure.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, displaying the bench's length, seat surface, and supporting metal frame.
attribute_leg_design: two rectangular black metal legs with a diagonal cross-brace
